name: GeoCopy
description: 地図から緯度・経度を抽出してコピーするツール

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' https://unpkg.com; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://unpkg.com; connect-src https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org
